name: Orange Nut Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
2. Stir in nuts, raisins, and orange peel.
3. In a separate bowl, beat together the egg, orange juice, and vegetable oil.
4. Pour the liquid mixture into the dry ingredients.
5. Mix until the dough is just combined and the fruit/nuts are well distributed.
6. Turn the batter into a greased 8x4 (or 9x5) loaf pan.
7. Bake at 350°F for 40 minutes or until a cake tester inserted in the center comes out clean. Check larger pans sooner if necessary.
8. Allow to cool in the pan for 10 minutes before turning out onto a wire rack to cool completely.
9. Wrap in waxed paper and store overnight before slicing.
